Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Modernize into semanticsmith Python + R packages

- Add shared C core (csrc/) implementing Gotoh's algorithm for
  local alignment with affine gap penalties
- Add Python package (python/) with Cython wrapper, pure-Python
  fallback, similarity helpers (gensim, matrix, constant, callable),
  batch alignment, colored visualization, and full test suite
- Add R package (r/) with Rcpp wrapper, tidyverse-native API
  (tibble outputs, pipe-friendly, tidy eval), sim_from_embeddings
  for word2vec integration, and testthat suite
- Add vignettes/getting-started docs for both packages
- Move original scripts and notebooks to legacy/
- Update README with installation and usage for both packages
- Add .github/copilot-instructions.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(monitor): dependabot batch processing + trial-removal (dry-run) (#1055)

Adds Dependabot batch processing, trial-removal logic, integration
DRY_RUN workflow, and PR previews.

What this PR does:
- scripts/process-dependabot-alerts.js: fetch Dependabot alerts, map to
candidate package.json files, generate
dependabot-override-plan.json/.txt, generate pr-previews, and
trial-remove overrides in an ephemeral workspace (DRY_RUN).
- .github/workflows/dependabot-override-batch.yml: integration job that
runs the batch in DRY_RUN and uploads previews.
- tests/unit/process-dependabot-alerts.spec.js: unit tests for mapping
logic.

Notes:
- DRY_RUN by default; live PR creation remains gated behind
WRITE_TOKEN/GitHub App and manual confirmation.
- The monitor workflow (.github/workflows/monitor-overrides.yml) will
track overrides added by these PRs and attempt removal later.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(monitor): add overrides monitor prototype (#1054)

This PR adds a prototype GitHub Action and helper script to monitor npm
package.json overrides and create PRs to remove obsolete overrides.

Files included:
- .github/workflows/monitor-overrides.yml (prototype scaffold)
- .github/workflows/monitor-overrides-integration.yml (integration
tests)
- scripts/remove-override.js (analyzer)
- tests/fixtures/... (integration fixtures)
- tests/unit/remove-override.spec.js (unit tests)

Notes:
- Workflow defaults to dry-run; merge to the default branch (main) for
scheduled runs and issue/comment triggers to operate.
- This is a prototype; trial-removal and full PR-creation are gated
behind DRY_RUN=false and proper tokens.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: CL-8000 style scale display with tare buttons and stability indicator

- Redesigned weight section header: scale name + connection dot + balance symbol
- Stable/unstable indicator: green STABIL / amber blinking KARARSIZ
- Balance symbol rotates when unstable (like a real scale)
- Tare source icon in DARA row: pencil (manual), package (product), scale (taken)
- Three function buttons: DARA AL (take tare), SIFIRLA (zero), DARA SİL (clear tare)
  - DARA AL: records current gross as tare (NET -> 0)
  - SIFIRLA: sets zero offset so gross display shows 0
  - DARA SİL: clears tare and zero offset
- Unit selector: kg / gr toggle (all display values update in real time)
- Refactored: brutWeight(), toDisp(), dispUnitStr(), daraIcon() helpers
- zeroOffset and daraSrc state variables added
- loadScales/activateScale update ws-name-txt element

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: enfiproV3
repository.description: Endüstriyel tartılı etiketleme POS sistemi — Docker, Django, Node.js

commit.message:
feat: Android Q virtual keyboard + multi-scale mgmt + BLE/UDP/TCP scale support

Changes:
- Replaced numpad modal with Android Q-style slide-up keyboard
  - Numeric keypad for DARA (kg) and BIRIM GRAMAJ (gr)
  - Full Turkish QWERTY keyboard for product search
  - Shift support, Turkish chars (g u s i o c), smooth animation
  - Keyboard module (IIFE) with showNumpad/showQwerty API
- Multi-scale management system (Scale model, CRUD views, API)
  - Scale modes: serial, tcp, udp, bluetooth, mock
  - Dashboard scale selector dropdown
  - Active scale persisted in database
- BLE 4.0 support via @abandonware/noble (GATT Weight Scale Profile)
- UDP/ESPEasy integration with deepFind for nested JSON
- TCP direct connection mode for Ethernet scales
- Dashboard: BRUT/DARA/NET display + piece counter (ADET/BIRIM GRAMAJ)
- Docker state cleanup: removed stale container metadata
- Scale migrations: 0001_initial

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test: add shared fixtures and improve test infrastructure (#105)

- Add project-wide tests/conftest.py with common path fixtures,
  seed reset, mocks, and skip marks (skip_if_missing_testdata,
  skip_if_no_gpu)
- Implement --use-gpu pytest option via pytest_addoption and
  use_gpu fixture so the gpu_compatible marker is functional
- Guard all CUDA calls in reset_seed behind torch.cuda.is_available()
  to prevent failures in CPU-only environments
- Add CLI-specific tests/mussel/cli/conftest.py with test_data_path_cli
  alias fixture
- Register gpu_compatible marker in pyproject.toml

Addresses review comments:
- No unused heavy imports at collection time
- --use-gpu flag properly registered via pytest_addoption
- CUDA API calls guarded for CPU-only torch installs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: add Infisical resource limits and fix linkerd-crds CRD conflict

- Add CPU/memory limits to Infisical standalone to satisfy Kyverno
  require-resource-limits policy
- Add ignoreDifferences for CRD metadata annotations/labels in
  linkerd-crds to resolve httproutes CRD ownership conflict with
  Traefik, and add RespectIgnoreDifferences sync option

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: initial implementation of KG testing harness

- 4 graph types: Simple, Hierarchical, Multi, WeightedGraph
- 5 multi-turn test scenarios (54 total turns)
- Ollama client with qwen3.5:4b + thinking token stripping
- Context manager with sliding window (forces KG use)
- KG-augmented agent with label/tag search and neighbor expansion
- Test runner with keyword accuracy evaluation
- Markdown reporter for per-run and summary reports
- Research matrix builder for full parameter sweep
- Initial quick test: 98.3% accuracy across 54 turns

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add create-authenticated-npmrc step to emitter archetype (#2156)

npm does not walk up directories to find .npmrc, so create the
.npmrc dynamically in Agent.TempDirectory before running npm commands.
Pass NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG env var so npm finds it. Covers both the
emitter Initialize-WorkingDirectory steps and the tsp-client install.

Co-authored-by: jolov <jolov@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix duplicate segments on initial API update (#713)

* Initial plan

* fix: replace RunSegmentPluginProviders with type-scoped CreateOrReplaceSegmentAsync to prevent duplicate segments

When segment-editor-mobile's saveAllSegments fires one POST MediaSegmentsApi/{itemId}
per segment in parallel, the old UpdateMediaSegmentsAsync (RunSegmentPluginProviders
forceOverwrite=true) call in CreateSegmentAsync deleted ALL Jellyfin segments and
re-added ALL from the plugin DB for every request. Concurrent requests raced:
both saw each other's newly-added segments and added them again, producing one
duplicate per segment in Jellyfin's DB.

Fix: add CreateOrReplaceSegmentAsync to MediaSegmentUpdateManager, which is
type-scoped - it only deletes/creates the one segment type being saved - making
concurrent creates of different types safe. Document the race in comments for
future maintainers of both projects.

Co-authored-by: AbandonedCart <1173913+AbandonedCart@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: restore filterByProvider: false in CreateOrReplaceSegmentAsync; add commercial dedup; clean up comments

- Use filterByProvider: false so existing segments from any provider are
  visible when replacing/deduplicating, enabling edits regardless of which
  provider originally created the segment
- For commercial segments: skip creation when an identical entry (same
  StartTicks + EndTicks) already exists instead of blindly appending
- Replace PR-narrative prose in comments with concise functional docs

Co-authored-by: AbandonedCart <1173913+AbandonedCart@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: close commercial-segment race window; parallelize non-commercial deletes with per-failure logging

- Add ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, SemaphoreSlim> keyed by item ID so the
  GetSegmentsAsync + CreateSegmentAsync sequence inside
  CreateOrReplaceSegmentAsync is serialised per item, closing the TOCTOU
  race that could produce duplicate commercial segments under concurrent
  saves of the same item
- Replace sequential foreach delete loop with Task.WhenAll so stale
  non-commercial segments are removed in parallel
- Wrap each parallel delete in try/catch; individual failures are logged
  via a new LogErrorDeletingSegment message and do not abort sibling deletes

Co-authored-by: AbandonedCart <1173913+AbandonedCart@users.noreply.github.com>

* Potential fix for pull request finding 'Generic catch clause'

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <223894421+github-code-quality[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Potential fix for pull request finding 'Generic catch clause'

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <223894421+github-code-quality[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Restore the catch-all error and continue

* Potential fix for pull request finding 'Generic catch clause'

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <223894421+github-code-quality[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove stray UTF-8 BOM from migration file to resolve SA1137

Co-authored-by: AbandonedCart <1173913+AbandonedCart@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update SegmentEditorController.cs

* Revert "Update SegmentEditorController.cs"

This reverts commit a6a9af1f2c68b2cb0d16d4d73f18159d3030510a.

* fix: replace ConcurrentDictionary semaphore with ref-counted design to prevent SemaphoreFullException and unbounded growth

Co-authored-by: AbandonedCart <1173913+AbandonedCart@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

tables had tight padding with no visual differentiation between rows.

  highlights, more cell padding (0.9rem), uppercase headers

in title.

commit.message:
docs: add diagnostic matrix to spec training method page

Why: After spec11 r1 finished with 2/35 exact match, operators need a
concrete symptom→cause→action matrix to decide the next move without
reasoning from first principles. The existing page had methodology and
decision cards but no operational lookup table.

Added three new sections:
- Diagnostic Matrix: 10-row table mapping run symptoms (low exact across
  all layouts, probe accounting bugs, loss plateau, stage label bugs)
  to likely causes and concrete actions, with real examples from spec03
  through spec11 r1
- Reading the Probe Report: 5 metrics with healthy ranges and red flags
  (exact_match, renderable, rendered_svg_ok, per-layout, train/dev/test)
- Reading the Loss Curve: 6 patterns with interpretations (smooth descent,
  plateau, stage boundary spike, parity divergence, grad norm collapse,
  oscillation)

These complement the training-intuition page's Phase 1-7 matrix, which
covers training dynamics (gradients, attention, weights). This new matrix
covers experiment-level decisions (probes, curriculum, representation).

Test: Site builds cleanly. All tables balanced (9/9). Cross-reference
to training-intuition.html updated.

commit.message:
Create Android Pexeso memory card game in Java

- 4x8 grid (32 cards = 16 pairs) via RecyclerView + GridLayoutManager(4)
- 16 animal emoji pairs shuffled with Collections.shuffle() on each start
- Flip mechanic: tap reveals card; 2nd card triggers pair evaluation
- Match: both cards stay face-up with green background (card_matched)
- No match: both cards flip back after 800 ms via Handler.postDelayed
- isChecking flag blocks extra taps during the delay period
- Move counter increments on every pair-flip attempt
- ScoreManager persists the all-time lowest move count in SharedPreferences
- Game-over AlertDialog shows moves, new-high-score notice, play-again / high-score buttons
- HighScoreActivity displays best score and offers a confirmed reset
- Square card cells via 100% paddingTop spacer (responsive across screen sizes)
- ContextCompat.getColor used throughout (no deprecated Resources.getColor)
- All UI text in Czech; minSdk 21 / targetSdk 34 / Java 1.8
- Updated README.md with full technical documentation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial commit: Web-Vitals Tracker Chrome extension

Tracks TTFB, FCP, and LCP metrics across navigations with per-URL
percentile summaries (p50, p75, p99). Features a popup UI with regex
URL filtering and a pinnable on-page overlay that updates live.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
